caption:
Most PM teams skip the setup and wonder why AI output sounds generic.

Before I ask Claude (or any model) to draft a PRD, I make sure four things are in the thread:

→ The decision we're actually making (not the feature list)
→ 2–3 user quotes or support snippets from this week
→ Success metrics we already agree on
→ What we're explicitly NOT solving

Without that, you're not using AI — you're outsourcing blank-page anxiety.

The win isn't faster writing. It's fewer reviews where someone asks "what problem is this solving?"

What's the one artifact you'd never start an AI session without?

#productmanagement #artificialintelligence #startups
